title: astragalus beatleyae
intro: Astragalus beatleyae is a species of legume in the pea family. It is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus beatleyae is traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and has been prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting respiratory function.
